'''√v-b-r''' ('''kavabar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lady|lady]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-b-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lady|lady]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √v-b-r
|-
! Lemma
| kavabar
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thivabar || jivabar || shivabar || kivabar
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuvabar || jujuvabar || shushuvabar || kukuvabar
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuvabar || juvabar || shuvabar || kuvabar
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuvabar || juvabar || shuvabar || kuvabar
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thevabar || jevabar || shevabar || kevabar
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothovabar || jojovabar || shoshovabar || kokovabar
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thovabar || jovabar || shovabar || kovabar
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thovabar || jovabar || shovabar || kovabar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || vabar || vabar || vabar || vabar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || vabar || vabar || vabar || vabar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || vabar || vabar || vabar || vabar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || vabar || vabar || vabar || vabar
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thævabar || jævabar || shævabar || kævabar
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathavabar || jajavabar || shashavabar || kakavabar
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thavabar || javabar || shavabar || kavabar
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thavabar || javabar || shavabar || kavabar
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shavabar
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshavabar
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishavabar
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shavabarnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshavabarnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishavabarnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shavabarshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshavabarnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishavabarshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shavabarro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshavabarnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishavabarro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shavabarmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshavabarnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishavabarmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shavabarsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshavabarnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishavabarsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shavabarng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshavabarnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishavabarng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shavabarya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshavabarnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishavabarya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shavabaryam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshavabarnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishavabaryam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shavabarnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshavabarnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishavabarnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shavabarnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavabarnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavabarnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shavabarnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshavabarnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavabarnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shavabarshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshavabarnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishavabarshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shavabarshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavabarnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavabarshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shavabarshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshavabarnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavabarshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shavabarronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshavabarnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishavabarronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shavabarroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshavabarnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishavabarroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shavabarromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshavabarnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishavabarromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shavabarmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshavabarnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishavabarmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shavabarmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshavabarnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishavabarmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shavabarmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshavabarnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishavabarmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
